reasoning: Billie Eilish has had a very strong 2024 and 2025, fueled by her album 'Hit Me Hard and Soft' and a significant surge in monthly listeners, briefly surpassing Taylor Swift for the #1 spot in that specific metric. However, the Spotify Wrapped 'Top Artist' title is determined by total annual streams, not peak monthly listeners. Search evidence shows that Taylor Swift remains the dominant force in total streaming volume, having released the record-breaking 'The Tortured Poets Department' in early 2025 (which became the year's most-streamed album) and a follow-up album 'Ophelia' in October 2025. Historical data and 2025 year-to-date reports consistently rank Taylor Swift as the #1 most-streamed artist globally, often with more than double the daily or annual streaming volume of Billie Eilish. Given Swift's release schedule and catalog depth, it is extremely unlikely for Eilish to overtake her for the calendar year title.
